title: jasione crispa subsp. cavanillesii
intro: Jasione crispa subsp. cavanillesii is a subspecies of the rockrose plant, also known as the 'Cavanilles' rockrose', which is a flowering plant in the bellflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Jasione crispa subsp. cavanillesii include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
